titleStmt.title: SII 23.41: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 41. (A.R. No. 41 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine Rājarāja I: year 10: 994-95 A.D.

summary.p: This is dated in the 10th year of Rājarājakēsarivarman (Rājarāja I) ‘the victor of Kāndaḷūr-śālai’, and records an endowment of 140 kāśu by one Tāḻi Pulichchāṉaṉ of Kappalūr in [Uṟa]ttūrkkūṟṟam for feeding two Brāhmaṇas every day in the temple of Tiruviśalūr-Perumāḷ (with the offerings made to God), for anointing the image of the deity with scent (sandal ?) and for waving incense before the god, and for burning a perpetual lamp. With this amount 40 kuḻi of land is said to have been purchased (by the temple authorities as permanent investment).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kān=taḷurccālai kalamaṟutta kovirāja Irājakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10Āvatu vaṭakarait teva
tānap brahmadeyam Amaṉinārāyaṇaśaturvetimaṅkalamuṭaiya tiruvica lūrp perumā
ḷ śrī koyililey Uttamāgram cantrirādittyaval Iruvar brāhmaṇar Uṇṇa Uṟattūṟkkūṟṟattuk kappalūru
ṭaiyāṉ tāḻi puliccāṉaṉ vaitta kācu 8 10 Ivaṉey Uṭaiyārkkut tirumeyp pūccu cata Uḻakkuc cā kkuḻampu cārc cāttiaruḷa
vaitta kācu 10 5- m Ivaṉey non=tāviḷakku 1- ṉukku vaitta kācu 2 10 5- m Ivaṉey tiruppukaikku vaitta kācu 2 10- m Ākak kācu
100 4 10 I ṉūṟṟunāṟpatu kācuṅ kuṭuttuk koṇṭa nila n=ti ttu Āyiravaṉ kiḻkarai
Iruṅkaṇṭi muttaṉpaṭṭariṭaik koṇṭa nilam ṅ kuḻi nāṟpatuṅ koṇṭatu Ivai cantrādittyaval Ivai panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 23.41 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
